title: Fortive Schedules Third Quarter 2023 Earnings Conference Call
text: EVERETT, Wash.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Fortive Corporation (“Fortive”) (NYSE: FTV) today announced that it will webcast its earnings conference call for the third quarter 2023 on Wednesday, October 25, 2023 beginning at 12:00 p.m. ET and lasting approximately 1 hour. The call and an accompanying slide presentation will be webcast on the "Investors" section of Fortive's website, www.fortive.com, under "Events/Presentations." A replay of the webcast will be available at the same location shortly after.

title: Fortive (FTV) Stock Gains 19% YTD: Will the Trend Continue?
text: Fortive's (FTV) performance benefits from momentum in software and services businesses and recovery in the healthcare segment.
